rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JAMES JOHNSON, SR REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: Respondent's Motion to Quash Deposition Supoena is granted in part and denied in part. The subpoenaed party is to produce to Respondent all information and documents in its custody showing net sales proceeds on the sale of 254 Thrift Street, San Francisco, CA 94112. The Motion to Quash is otherwise granted for all other information and documents sought by the subpoena. Reasonable attorney's fees and the $60 filing fee are awarded to Respondent in connection with bringing this Motion. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, January 23, 2018.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JAMES JOHNSON, SR REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena And Imposition Of Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion to Compel Compliance with Deposition Subpoena and Imposition of Sanctions is denied. Reasonable attorney's fees are awarded to Respondent in connection with opposing this motion. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, January 23, 2018.
